linkedin.text: Nice is the Riviera made easy. ✈️ A major international airport, the Côte d'Azur on your doorstep and Monaco, Cannes and Antibes all within an easy drive — it's the ultimate base for a multi-day incentive that feels effortlessly glamorous. Seafront galas, hilltop villa dinners, day trips along the most photographed coast in Europe. We handle the complexity so your guests only feel the elegance. Picturing the French Riviera for your 2026 program? Tell us your dates and group size — we'll build a draft plan this week. 🌊 #UproductionEvents #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Nice #FrenchRiviera #MICE #LuxuryTravel #EventDestination

image_prompt: Sweeping aerial view along the Promenade des Anglais in Nice at golden hour, the curving Baie des Anges with deep blue water meeting the pebble shoreline, Belle Époque facades and palm trees lining the bay, hills rising behind the city, no people discernible, vast luminous coastline. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
